Introduction
    Sasanam is a movie starring Gautami and Arvind Swamy. Muthiah (Arvind Swamy) and his wife Visalakshi (Gouthami) are a loving couple, and they come across Saroji (Ranjitha) who with no one to go for, takes refuge in Muthiah's house....
